what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline icon showing a simple flow diagram: one top rounded rectangle branching to two lower rounded rectangles.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with no fill and currentColor stroke.
Root stroke styling sets width 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
Three rounded rectangles form the diagram nodes: one top node and two lower nodes.
A single path connects the top node down to a split leading to the two lower nodes.
standouts: The icon communicates a branching node diagram using only three rectangles and one connector path.
Color is inherited through currentColor, making it themeable by the caller.
conventions: Uses a compact inline SVG icon structure.
Follows outline-icon conventions with fill="none" and shared stroke attributes on the root element.
Uses rounded corners on nodes via rx="1".
Does not include embedded title, description, or ARIA attributes.
concerns: No embedded accessible label is present.
The connector is one combined path, so individual branches are not separately addressable.
notes: A small themeable outline icon for representing a flowchart-style branching structure.
questions: Is this SVG intended to be purely decorative or labeled by the consuming component?
Should individual diagram branches ever need separate styling or animation?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a flow-diagram icon, and the SVG depicts a three-node branching flow diagram.
intention_signals: It seems intended to provide a reusable, color-inheriting icon for process flow, hierarchy, or diagram-related UI actions.
contribution: Contributes a compact reusable outline symbol for branching flow or hierarchy concepts, with caller-controlled color and simple SVG geometry.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor SVG outline icon depicting one top rounded rectangle branching to two lower rounded rectangles as a flow diagram.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing flowchart, process, or hierarchy concepts in an icon set while inheriting visual styling from the surrounding UI.
